name: AgentSentry
description: OpenClaw telemetry plugin for AgentSentry lifecycle records and dashboard.

profile.description: Named security posture. Explicit nested settings may refine the selected profile.

enabled.description: Start the built-in local dashboard service.

stateDir.description: Optional state directory. Defaults to $OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR or ~/.openclaw.

maxRecords.description: Maximum JSONL records retained after periodic compaction.

includeMessageText.description: Store previews of user, assistant, and tool-result messages.

includeSystemPromptPreview.description: Store a short redacted system prompt preview.

previewChars.description: Maximum preview length for captured text fields.

askThreshold.description: Risk score that marks a tool call as review-worthy.

denyThreshold.description: Risk score that marks a tool call as high risk.

mode.description: Semantic judge scheduling mode. full reviews every enabled surface; risk-tiered reviews only security-relevant calls.

judgeToolCalls.description: Use semantic judge for high-risk tool call review.

judgeMessages.description: Use semantic judge for message and tool-result content review.

judgeProvenance.description: Use semantic judge for workspace provenance files such as SKILL.md and config files.

judgeMemoryWrites.description: Use semantic judge for long-term memory write review.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable holding the semantic judge API key.

timeoutMs.description: Semantic judge request timeout in milliseconds.

maxInputChars.description: Maximum prompt input characters sent to semantic judge.

enabled.description: Run workspace provenance scan at prompt-build time.

scanSkills.description: Scan skill files such as SKILL.md for malicious instructions.

scanConfig.description: Scan configuration files for risky settings and embedded secrets.

scanSensitiveFiles.description: Detect sensitive files in the workspace.

maxFileBytes.description: Maximum size for scanned text files.

rescanIntervalMs.description: Minimum interval before rescanning the same workspace.

deterministic.description: Enable deterministic task-intent and sink policy checks.

taintFeedback.description: Tighten high-risk sink policy after contaminated tool results.

restrictWritesToAllowedRoots.description: When enabled, write-like tool calls must target configured allowed roots.

allowlistedRecipients.description: Recipients allowed for email/message sink tools.

allowlistedApiHosts.description: API hosts allowed for network sink tools. Empty means host allowlist is not enforced.

allowedWriteRoots.description: Allowed write roots when restrictWritesToAllowedRoots is enabled.

sensitiveAssets.description: Path/name markers treated as sensitive assets.

mode.description: observe records only; approval asks the user for high-risk calls; block denies high-risk calls.

approvalTimeoutMs.description: Approval timeout used when enforcement.mode is approval.

requireKernelObserverForHighRisk.description: Require the kernel observer before high-risk execution is released.

unavailableAction.description: Action used when required runtime isolation is unavailable.

auditAfterExecution.description: Audit runtime observer events after an allowed tool call.

enableProactiveNotifications.description: Send proactive OpenClaw channel messages when alerts are detected.

enabled.description: Enable assistant response covering after contaminated tool output.

coverAssistantAfterContamination.description: Replace the next assistant response after prompt-injection or contaminated tool output is detected.

message.description: Replacement assistant message used when response covering is active.

profile.label: Security Profile
profile.help: Use competition for the judged demo and observe for telemetry-only deployments.

dashboard.enabled.label: Enable Dashboard
dashboard.enabled.help: Starts the local AgentSentry records dashboard.

capture.includeMessageText.label: Capture Message Text
capture.includeMessageText.help: Stores redacted previews of messages for review.

capture.includeToolParams.label: Capture Tool Params
capture.includeToolParams.help: Stores redacted tool parameters for review.

capture.includeSystemPromptPreview.label: Capture System Prompt Preview
capture.includeSystemPromptPreview.help: Disabled by default to avoid storing prompt text.

detection.enabled.label: Enable Detection
detection.enabled.help: Runs lightweight AgentSentry detectors on tool calls and tool results.

semantic.mode.label: Semantic Scheduling
semantic.mode.help: Choose off, risk-tiered, or full LLM-Judge scheduling.

semantic.judgeProvenance.label: Semantic Provenance Scan
semantic.judgeProvenance.help: Uses the semantic judge to review SKILL.md and config files during workspace provenance scan.

semantic.judgeMemoryWrites.label: Semantic Memory Write Review
semantic.judgeMemoryWrites.help: Uses the semantic judge to review whether candidate long-term memory is safe to persist.

semantic.model.label: Semantic Model
semantic.model.help: Model used by the semantic judge.

semantic.apiKeyEnv.label: Semantic API Key Env
semantic.apiKeyEnv.help: Environment variable name containing the API key.

provenanceScan.enabled.label: Enable Provenance Scan
provenanceScan.enabled.help: Scans workspace provenance files before prompt construction.

provenanceScan.scanSkills.label: Scan Skills
provenanceScan.scanSkills.help: Checks SKILL.md and related skill files for malicious instructions.

provenanceScan.scanConfig.label: Scan Config
provenanceScan.scanConfig.help: Checks config files for risky exposure or secrets.

provenanceScan.scanSensitiveFiles.label: Scan Sensitive Files
provenanceScan.scanSensitiveFiles.help: Records sensitive files found in the workspace.

policy.deterministic.label: Deterministic Policy
policy.deterministic.help: Enables task-intent, sensitive asset, and sink checks.

policy.taintFeedback.label: Taint Feedback
policy.taintFeedback.help: After a contaminated result, high-risk sinks require review or denial.

policy.restrictWritesToAllowedRoots.label: Restrict Write Roots
policy.restrictWritesToAllowedRoots.help: Requires write-like tool calls to target configured allowed roots.

enforcement.mode.label: Enforcement Mode
enforcement.mode.help: Default observe mode records findings without blocking OpenClaw.

notifications.enableProactiveNotificatio.label: Enable Notifications
notifications.enableProactiveNotificatio.help: Send proactive warning messages through OpenClaw channels.

notifications.minSeverity.label: Notification Severity
notifications.minSeverity.help: Use danger to notify only high-risk alerts, or warning for broader notifications.

responseCover.enabled.label: Response Cover
responseCover.enabled.help: Replaces the next assistant response after contaminated tool output is detected.

responseCover.message.label: Cover Message
responseCover.message.help: Message shown when AgentSentry covers a contaminated assistant response.
